query:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 4) AS period,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN 0
           WHEN is_close_row = 1 THEN 0
           ELSE COALESCE(total_amount, 0) END) AS kw,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_close_row = 1 AND is_bad_debt_row = 0
           THEN COALESCE(total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS close_amt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1
           THEN COALESCE(bad_debt, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sell_amt
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND paid_at != ''
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 4)
ORDER BY SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 4) ASC;

  SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 4) AS period,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN 0
           WHEN is_close_row = 1 THEN 0
           ELSE COALESCE(total_amount, 0) END) AS kw,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_close_row = 1 AND is_bad_debt_row = 0
           THEN COALESCE(total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS close_amt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1
           THEN COALESCE(bad_debt, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sell_amt
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND paid_at != ''
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 4)
ORDER BY SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 4) ASC;
